title: Halloween Crow Candle Ornament – Light Up Flickering LED Raven Decoration with Skull Base 20cm Battery Operated Plastic Candle Assorted Orange or Purple Flame for Haunted House & Party Decor
features: SPOOKY HALLOWEEN DECOR: Add instant fright to your home, party, or haunted house with this eerie crow perched beside a glowing candle – the perfect gothic ornament to set the mood.
REALISTIC FLICKERING FLAME: LED light mimics the movement of a real candle flame, creating an atmospheric glow without smoke, mess, or risk of fire.
READY TO USE OUT OF THE BOX: Supplied with 3 x LR44 batteries already installed – simply pull the safety tab and enjoy instant spooky ambience anywhere.
STURDY & REUSABLE DESIGN: Crafted from durable high-quality plastic with a flat, solid base, ensuring the decoration stays stable on tables, shelves, or mantels.
ASSORTED COLOURS SENT AT RANDOM: Each order includes one candle in either orange or purple design, making every decoration a unique surprise.
VERSATILE HALLOWEEN PROP: Ideal for indoor displays, window sills, party centrepieces, or haunted house themes – a reusable Halloween accessory year after year.
20CM TABLETOP SIZE: Measuring 20cm tall with a 10cm wide base, this light-up candle is the ideal size for mantels, windowsills, or centrepieces without taking up too much space.
description: Product description Transform your home into a haunted haven this Halloween with the spooky light-up crow candle decoration. Combining gothic style with glowing ambience, this eerie ornament instantly sets the mood for parties, haunted houses, or seasonal displays. Standing at 20cm tall with a 10cm wide base , the design features a realistic black crow perched beside a sinister skull and spider motif. Above, a dripping-effect candle flickers with an LED flame that glows and moves like the real thing, casting shadows and atmosphere without smoke, mess, or fire risk. Each decoration arrives ready to use – supplied with 3 x LR44 batteries already installed. Simply remove the safety tab and watch your room transform with an eerie glow. The solid flat base ensures it stays stable on any surface, whether placed on tables, mantels, or window sills. Colours are sent at random, with either an orange or purple candle for a surprise element that makes each piece unique. Whichever you receive, both colours deliver maximum spooky impact. Perfect for Halloween parties, gothic displays, or as a reusable seasonal decoration , this light-up crow candle is a must-have for anyone looking to bring a chilling yet fun atmosphere to their celebration. Keep and reuse it year after year as part of your ultimate Halloween collection. Safety Warning Keep away from flammable materials. Do not expose to rain or moisture. Keep out of reach of children.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Halloween Decoration, Party Decor, Seasonal Display
